quiz.question:
Black plays ...Bf8.

Try to calculate the line where you sacrifice your knight to set up a discovered check, starting with Nxf6+.

Does this sacrifice work?

answers.text: No, because Black can save themselves from the double threat.

feedback.text: Correct! At the end of the line, Black has ...Qd5. Try to visualize it.

distractors.text: Yes, because we'll threaten both the queen and discovered check with Rxe6.

feedback.text: Correct, but Black's going to be able to sufficiently defend!

distractors.text: No, because Black doesn't have to capture on f6 when we sacrifice.

feedback.text: If Black doesn't capture on f6, we'll take the rook on e8 or the knight on d5!
